businessQuestion: Which products have the lowest forecast accuracy?
sqlAnswer:
SELECT
        DP.CATEGORY,
        DP.PRODUCT_NAME,
        DD.FISCAL_YEAR,
        ROUND(AVG(FF.FORECAST_ACCURACY_PCT),2) AS FORECAST_ACCURACY,
        AVG(FF.FORECAST_ERROR_PCT) AS FORECAST_ERROR_PCT
FROM CONVERSA_DEMO.CLOTHING_RETAIL.FACT_FORECAST FF
        JOIN CONVERSA_DEMO.CLOTHING_RETAIL.DIM_PRODUCT DP
        ON FF.PRODUCT_KEY = DP.PRODUCT_KEY
        JOIN CONVERSA_DEMO.CLOTHING_RETAIL.DIM_DATE DD
        ON FF.DATE_KEY = DD.DATE_KEY
GROUP BY
        DP.CATEGORY,
        DP.PRODUCT_NAME,
        DD.FISCAL_YEAR
ORDER BY FORECAST_ACCURACY ASC;
businessContext: Demand planners want to improve forecasting models for products with poor forecast accuracy.
